title: Use Status column in "stack by" option for diagrams

posts.author: LaurentMiralles (Laurent Miralles)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I’m trying to custom my diagram to display number of new contacts per month. It’s fine.

But I would like to stack by Status, which is not available. Only plenty of other type are available, such as list, people, date etc…
So it means that I’m able to know whether my new contact was sourced by such or such channels (because it is a list type), but I’m not able to know is in such or such state …

I don’t get why it is not possible?

Thanks for your support

monday_support_diagram|279x500

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @LaurentMiralles,

Thanks for posting! You should actually be able to stack by status It will look something like this in the chart view or chart widget settings:

image364×618 28.6 KB

Let me know if you’re still not seeing this option! Happy to help further.
